title: carphalea obovata
intro: Carphalea obovata is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa, classified as a member of the hibiscus family (Malvaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Carphalea obovata include the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Traditional herbal preparations for Carphalea obovata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are made from the leaves and used to harness its medicinal properties.
